required_skills: Strong knowledge of JavaScript and modern frontend frameworks
Experience with backend frameworks and API development
Understanding of database design and query optimization
Design, develop, and maintain web applications
Build responsive UI using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React or similar frameworks
Develop backend services using Node.js, Python (Flask/Django), or similar technologies
Design and manage databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB)
Implement RESTful APIs and integrate third-party services
Ensure performance, scalability, and security of applications
missing_skills: Strong knowledge of JavaScript and modern frontend frameworks
Experience with backend frameworks and API development
Understanding of database design and query optimization
Design, develop, and maintain web applications
Build responsive UI using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React or similar frameworks
Develop backend services using Node.js, Python (Flask/Django), or similar technologies
Design and manage databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB)
Implement RESTful APIs and integrate third-party services
Ensure performance, scalability, and security of applications

level_2.title: Technical Questions
questions: What are the basic features of Java?
How do you create a class in Java?
What is the difference between interface and abstract class?

level_3.title: Behavioral Questions
questions: Share an example of when you received tough feedback on your work and how you changed your approach afterward.
Share a situation where you had to take ownership beyond your formal responsibilities to move a project forward.
Describe a time you had to learn Frontend frameworks or a similar concept quickly to meet a delivery commitment.

questions.question: For a Full Stack Developer interview, which answer best demonstrates practical understanding of JavaScript?
options: Say that JavaScript is important but avoid discussing any implementation details or outcomes.
Claim JavaScript is mostly handled automatically so deep understanding is unnecessary.
Focus on unrelated tools and hope the interviewer infers knowledge of JavaScript.
Describe where JavaScript fits in the system, why it was chosen, and what constraints it solved.
